bookDetails.title: Agile Web Development with Rails
bookDetails.author: Sam Ruby, Dave Thomas, David Heinemeier Hansson
bookDetails.description: Rails is a full-stack, open source web framework that enables you to create full-featured, sophisticated web-based applications, but with a twist... A full Rails application probably has less total code than the XML you'd need to configure the same application in other frameworks.
